title: Purella
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Species |image=[[File:Purella_egas.jpg]] |name=Purella |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Semi-sentient]]In ''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Lyric's World]]'', the purella that witnessed a Melodie kill a raith had coherent thoughts and feelings. |class=[[Spider/Legends|Spider]]''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Lyric's World]]'' |subspecies= |races= |height= |length=1 [[Meter/Legends|meter]] body
2 meters with 8 legs |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor=[[Color/Legends|Red]] |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor=Orange |distinctions=*4 barbed pincers on mouth *Black web *Yellow saliva |lifespan= |origin=[[Yavin 8/Legends|Yavin 8]] |habitat=Mountain caves |diet=*Melodie young *Raiths |language= }} {{Quote|The purella is a vicious beast who drags away her prey and traps it within the web of her lair. There is no escape from the web. The victim is consumed slowly.|[[Sannah]]|}} The '''purella''' was a large predator native to the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Yavin 8/Legends|Yavin 8]]. ==Biology and appearance== It was a large, bristle-haired spider with glowing orange eyes. It had a red body, yellow saliva, and four barbed pincers that injected venom. The purella trapped its prey in a thick, black web and would then slowly eat them. The slick underside and legs of the creature prevented it from getting stuck in its own webbing, but it was susceptible to getting trapped if it fell onto its hairy back.''[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin]]'' The purella preyed on the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Melodie]]s, though it was also prey in turn to the giant bird-like [[avril]]s, which were on the top of the moon's food chain. ==History== During their adventure within the mountains on the moon, [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] trainees [[Anakin Solo]] and [[Tahiri Veila]] faced one of these creatures during their attempts to find ancient [[Massassi/Legends|Massassi]] carvings holding the key to breaking the curse of the [[Golden Globe]] and freeing the countless trapped Massassi souls within. ==Appearances== *''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Lyric's World]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Promises]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of purellas}} *[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin'', Second Edition]] {{1stm}} *{{JournalCite|9|ISB Intercepts}} *''[[Alien Encounters]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' *[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} :[[File:Purella_Spider.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Purella and its web.]] [[Category:Arachnids]] [[Category:Creatures of Yavin 8]] [[Category:Predatory creatures]] [[Category:Semi-sentient species]] [[Category:Subterranean creatures]] [[Category:Venomous and poisonous creatures]]
